tagline: HTML presentations — pixel-perfect on a 1280×720 canvas

highlights.title: Fixed-Viewport Slides
highlights.description: Each slide is crafted HTML on a precise 1280×720 canvas — no scrolling, just clean layouts with theme.css design tokens.

highlights.title: Thumbnail Navigator
highlights.description: Drag slide thumbnails to reorder your story. Switch between content sets for locale variants or theme experiments.

highlights.title: Highlighter & Export
highlights.description: Draw freehand on any slide to mark areas for the agent. Export your deck as HTML or print to PDF when ready.
